{{Quote|A cloaking device would be nice for this jaunt. When you're snooping around Imperial Super Star Destroyers, it helps to be invisible. Maybe they won't notice I'm stealing one of their cargo shuttles. Yeah, right.|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mission to the ''Executor''''' was a minor conflict during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==The mission==
{{Quote|Here we go.|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Dark" />}}
After boarding the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] with a [[smuggler ship]] stolen from the Imperial [[Fuel Station Ergo/Legends|Fuel Station Ergo]], [[Kyle Katarn]] made his way through inner defenses of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].

After traversing two arenas housing three [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark troopers]], Katarn made his way to the [[hangar/Legends|shuttle bay]]. He operated the controls to guide a [[cargo container/Legends|shipping container]] to the launch bay, which then he boarded through the [[airlock/Legends|airlock]]. The container then left to dock to the ''[[Arc Hammer]]''.<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide" />

==Aftermath==
The success of the mission would lead to the downfall of [[Rom Mohc]] and the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] as Katarn sabotaged the ''Arc Hammer''.
